procedure.title: OLSK Small CNC electronic box assembly excerpt

steps.label: Assemble the electronic box top and bottom frame
Install the electronic box bottom panel

constraints.text: Remove the protective foils before attaching the panel.

steps.label: Install the motor drivers and motor power supply in the electronic box

constraints.text: Pay attention to the position of the motor drivers and motor power supply.

steps.label: Attach the vertical profiles to the prepared top and bottom frame

constraints.text: Attach the brackets to the vertical profiles before attaching them to the frame.
Tighten the screws together at the end.
